'''shongangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yamaskitic|yamaskitic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ng-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yamaskitic|yamaskitic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shongangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shongangithi|shongangithi]] || [[word:shongangiji|shongangiji]] || [[word:shongangishi|shongangishi]] || [[word:shongangiki|shongangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shonganguthuthu|shonganguthuthu]] || [[word:shongangujuju|shongangujuju]] || [[word:shongangushushu|shongangushushu]] || [[word:shongangukuku|shongangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shonganguthu|shonganguthu]] || [[word:shonganguju|shonganguju]] || [[word:shongangushu|shongangushu]] || [[word:shonganguku|shonganguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shongangufthuf|shongangufthuf]] || [[word:shongangufjuf|shongangufjuf]] || [[word:shongangufshuf|shongangufshuf]] || [[word:shongangufkuf|shongangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shongangethe|shongangethe]] || [[word:shongangeje|shongangeje]] || [[word:shongangeshe|shongangeshe]] || [[word:shongangeke|shongangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shongangothotho|shongangothotho]] || [[word:shongangojojo|shongangojojo]] || [[word:shongangoshosho|shongangoshosho]] || [[word:shongangokoko|shongangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shongangotho|shongangotho]] || [[word:shongangojo|shongangojo]] || [[word:shongangosho|shongangosho]] || [[word:shongangoko|shongangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shongangofthof|shongangofthof]] || [[word:shongangofjof|shongangofjof]] || [[word:shongangofshof|shongangofshof]] || [[word:shongangofkof|shongangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfthĂŻf|shongangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfjĂŻf|shongangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfshĂŻf|shongangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfkĂŻf|shongangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shongangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shongangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shongangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shongangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfthĂŻf|shongangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfjĂŻf|shongangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfshĂŻf|shongangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfkĂŻf|shongangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfthĂŻf|shongangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfjĂŻf|shongangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfshĂŻf|shongangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shongangĂŻfkĂŻf|shongangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shongangĂŠthĂŠ|shongangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shongangĂŠjĂŠ|shongangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shongangĂŠshĂŠ|shongangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shongangĂŠkĂŠ|shongangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shongangathatha|shongangathatha]] || [[word:shongangajaja|shongangajaja]] || [[word:shongangashasha|shongangashasha]] || [[word:shongangakaka|shongangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shongangatha|shongangatha]] || [[word:shongangaja|shongangaja]] || [[word:shongangasha|shongangasha]] || [[word:shongangaka|shongangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shongangafthaf|shongangafthaf]] || [[word:shongangafjaf|shongangafjaf]] || [[word:shongangafshaf|shongangafshaf]] || [[word:shongangafkaf|shongangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shongangasha|shongangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shongangshĂ«sha|shongangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shongangrosha|shongangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shongangmusha|shongangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shongangyasha|shongangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshongangnkshĂ«sha|goshongangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshongangnkrosha|goshongangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshongangnkmusha|goshongangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshongangnkyasha|goshongangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shongangangasha|shongangangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shongangangshĂ«sha|shongangangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shongangangrosha|shongangangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shongangangmusha|shongangangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shongangangyasha|shongangangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshongangangnkshĂ«sha|goshongangangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshongangangnkrosha|goshongangangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshongangangnkmusha|goshongangangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshongangangnkyasha|goshongangangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shengĂŠngasha|shengĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shengĂŠngshĂ«sha|shengĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shengĂŠngrosha|shengĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shengĂŠngmusha|shengĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shengĂŠngyasha|shengĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshengĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|goshengĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshengĂŠngnkrosha|goshengĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshengĂŠngnkmusha|goshengĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshengĂŠngnkyasha|goshengĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shongfangasha|shongfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shongfangshĂ«sha|shongfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shongfangrosha|shongfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shongfangmusha|shongfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shongfangyasha|shongfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshongfangnkshĂ«sha|goshongfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshongfangnkrosha|goshongfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshongfangnkmusha|goshongfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshongfangnkyasha|goshongfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
